_meta.description: Delete (offboard) a user from YeshID by name or email. Searches the people list, opens the person's profile, and triggers offboarding.

paramNotes.user_identifier: Name or email of the user to delete. Used to search the people table.

_meta.warning: Destructive action. Verify user_identifier before running in production mode.

person-row.resolveHint: Find <tr> in the people table whose text contains user_identifier. JS: findRow(user_identifier).

chain.code: (function() { const rows = [...document.querySelectorAll('table tbody tr')]; const match = rows.find(r => r.textContent.toLowerCase().includes('{{user_identifier}}'.toLowerCase())); if (!match) return { found: false, error: 'User not found: {{user_identifier}}' }; const link = match.querySelector('a[href]'); if (link) { link.click(); return { found: true, href: link.href }; } match.click(); return { found: true, clickedRow: true }; })()
chain.note: Find the matching row and click into the person detail page.
Wait for person detail page to load and offboard option to appear.
Navigate to offboard flow. The offboard page will have the user pre-selected from context, or require search.

chain.code: (function() { const rows = [...document.querySelectorAll('table tbody tr, [class*="row"]')]; const match = rows.find(r => r.textContent.toLowerCase().includes('{{user_identifier}}'.toLowerCase())); if (!match) return { found: false }; const cb = match.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]'); if (cb) { cb.click(); return { found: true, selectedCheckbox: true }; } match.click(); return { found: true, clickedRow: true }; })()
chain.note: Select the user in the offboard form.
